activity.intimate-hospitalisation: You intimated the TPA that you would be hospitalised.
activity.doctor-signs-admission-advice: The doctor signed the admission advice.
activity.cashless-eligibility-confirmed: The TPA confirmed you are eligible for cashless treatment.
activity.pre-auth-filed: The hospital filed the pre-authorisation request with the TPA.
activity.patient-discharged: You were discharged from the hospital.
activity.discharge-bill-finalised: The hospital finalised the discharge bill.
activity.claim-settled: The TPA settled the claim with the hospital.
activity.query-raised: The TPA raised a query and asked the hospital to clarify.
activity.query-resolved: The hospital answered the TPA's query.
activity.cashless-eligibility-declined: The TPA declined cashless eligibility — you will need to claim reimbursement after discharge.
activity.claim-form-submitted: You submitted the claim form with supporting documents.
activity.patient-action-needed: The TPA flagged that a response is needed from you before the claim can proceed.
activity.claim-partially-settled: The insurer settled part of your claim. Deductions have been applied.
activity.grievance-filed: You filed a grievance against the insurer's decision.
activity.grievance-acknowledged: The insurer acknowledged your grievance and is reviewing it.
activity.claim-rejected: The claim was rejected after adjudication.
activity.grievance-escalated: The grievance was escalated to the next level.
